'''Galas''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] in [[Kallistas]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A gem mine settlement, it was eventually abandoned and taken over by [[sand bear]]s and, later, by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent [[Pallas Quintell]] for a base. Quintell's [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] fighter was hidden there.

==Appearances==
